description_long: This is a modern electric kettle with a sleek, rounded body predominantly finished in glossy white and black plastic. The kettle features a pronounced, arched black handle on top, ergonomically designed for easy gripping and pouring. A spout extends from the front, shaped for precise pouring, and a removable domed lid with a small knob sits atop the main body. The base is wide, black, and appears to be an integrated heating plate, providing stability and housing the electrical components. A red button or switch is visible on the side, likely for power or operation control. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with no visible decorative patterns, emphasizing a functional and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A sleek, modern electric kettle with a glossy white and black finish, arched handle, and integrated heating base. It features a domed removable lid, a pronounced spout, and a red power button.
description_view_0: Side view showing the arched black handle, glossy white body, and the wide black base; the red power button is partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the spout, water level markings, and the symmetrical design of the handle and base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle and spout clearly visible, as well as the red power button on the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the handle, the red button in full, and the rounded contours of the base.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with small knob
